title: Cobblemon: Beyond Our Stars
description: a datapack that adds regional forms from worlds beyond our own.
body:
This Data Pack adds regional forms that originate from Ultra Space. These forms are leaking into our world and are waiting to be discovered. There are currently 33 forms/pokemon to be uncovered throughout the world, some of which are found in custom structures. Shinys can acquire a new form known as Shinings, any shiny pokemon can become shining by using a shiny stone.

![Image depicting the base, shiny and shining forms of Ultra Varient  Totodile](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/68df5ab79628bbf4781a6b7363f8965c2c5a649e_0.webp)
